author: Blake Anderson
title: Blake Anderson: monthly revenue ramp Jan–June
content:
$3.2k - January
$3.9k - February
$7.0k - March
$28.7k - April
$118.5k - May
$195.4k - June

author: Blake Anderson
title: Blake Anderson: 100k DAUs, bigger than Cal AI
content: Over 100k DAUs already too. This app will likely be multiple times bigger than Cal AI 🤝

author: Blake Anderson
title: Blake Anderson: 500k MAU / 80k DAU / $2.4m ARR, 50% MoM
content:
Hiring a founding engineer for an app with 500k mau, 80k dau. Targeting 1m dau by end of year.

$2.4m ARR, 50% MoM growth.

Must have experience building consumer web + mobile apps, ai agent frontend + backend, and world-class product sense.

author: Blake Anderson
title: Blake Anderson: everyone is on their own timeline
content:
I drove DoorDash 40+ hours a week during the summer until I was 22 years old so I could work on my businesses in my free time.

I often felt behind the rest of my peers — I had never even had an internship.

Don’t compare. Everybody is on their own timeline 🙏

author: Tibo
title: Tibo: crossed $1,000,000/month after $8m exit
content:
yes, I crossed $1,000,000 / month

was trying to keep it quiet but it got leaked on a pod so... let's go

quick backstory:

I sold Tweet Hunter and Taplio for $8m in 2024
then got back to work

and honestly, I was terrified

when you set a standard for yourself, you have to live by it and that pressure is real

every single thing I shipped felt scary - I felt like a fraud, "the lucky guy who got acquired once"

so I forced myself to ship a ton
a lot failed
I was embarrassed by the bugs in my MVPs
but I kept going

Revid, Outrank, SuperX, PostSyncer, Feather -> five products thriving

author: Tibo
title: Tibo: SEO alone made me over $1M; unlinked mentions
content:
SEO alone has made me over $1M

and I can't say it enough, it's not dead

the brands winning in SEO + AI search today aren't just the ones with better content or the most backlinks (still matters, don't skip it)
they're the ones with unlinked mentions

author: Tibo
title: Tibo: user got $149,615 in backlink value via Outrank
content:
this user gets about $10,000 in backlinks value per month, which cost $1k/m on Outrank
in total, he got $149,615 in backlinks value 🤯

author: Tibo
title: Tibo: paying users $100 to roast Editor v2 for feedback
content:
I’ll give you $100 to roast my product

we just rebuilt the entire Revid editor from scratch (Editor v2)

so here's the deal:

reply "V2" below
I add 2,000 credits ($100) to your account
you try Editor v2 and tell me everything that sucks — brutal feedback > polite feedback

author: Tibo
title: Tibo: joined a stealth project at $1k MRR, now $5k/mo
content:
there this new stealth project that I joined at $1k MRR that's now doing more than $5k / month
maybe another hit coming 👀

author: Greg Isenberg
title: Greg Isenberg: content strategy = free ideas + growth playbooks
content:
my entire content strategy is this

give you free startup ideas + growth playbooks that work

i won't hold back

and every time you build something from my tweets/pod I'm sippin' a martini & cheering you on

your success is my ultimate flex

now go ship something & make me proud
